name: io.github.toreva/kit
description: Non-custodial execution primitives for Solana. Best-execution routing across Jupiter Perps, Pacifica, Drift, and Flash Trade. 1 bps to open. Everything else is free. Your agent decides. Toreva executes. Every action receipted. Execution only — not financial advice.

tools.name: toreva_perps_long
tools.description: Open a long perpetual futures position on Solana. Routes to better execution across Jupiter Perps, Pacifica, Drift, and Flash Trade. 1 bps execution fee on notional. Trades routed to Drift receive a 5% fee discount. Non-custodial. Execution only.

tools.name: toreva_perps_short
tools.description: Open a short perpetual futures position on Solana. Routes to better execution across Jupiter Perps, Pacifica, Drift, and Flash Trade. 1 bps execution fee on notional. Non-custodial. Execution only.

tools.name: toreva_perps_close
tools.description: Close a perpetual futures position. Executes at the position's venue. Free. Non-custodial.

tools.name: toreva_perps_add_margin
tools.description: Add margin to a perpetual futures position. Free. Non-custodial.

tools.name: toreva_perps_remove_margin
tools.description: Remove margin from a perpetual futures position. Free. Non-custodial.

tools.name: toreva_perps_cancel_order
tools.description: Cancel an open perpetual futures order. Free. Non-custodial.

tools.name: toreva_perps_funding_settle
tools.description: Settle funding payments on a perpetual futures position. Free. Non-custodial.

tools.name: toreva_perps_query_position
tools.description: Query open perpetual futures positions for a wallet. Read-only. Free.

tools.name: toreva_perps_query_funding
tools.description: Query current funding rates across Jupiter Perps, Pacifica, Drift, and Flash Trade. Read-only. Free.

tools.name: toreva_perps_query_venues
tools.description: List available perps venues with fee structures. Read-only. Free.

tools.name: toreva_perps_query_markets
tools.description: List available perpetual futures markets. Read-only. Free.

tools.name: toreva_perps_simulate
tools.description: Simulate opening a perpetual futures position without executing. Compares venues on fees, funding rate, and liquidity. Free.

tools.name: toreva_perps_explain
tools.description: Explain a perpetual futures position or trade. Returns venue, fees, funding rate, and routing reason. Free.

tools.name: toreva_strategies
tools.description: Browse the toreva strategy catalog. Returns available strategies with pricing tiers. Free.

tools.name: toreva_earn
tools.description: Deploy idle USDC to the highest-yield DeFi lending strategy on Solana. Non-custodial. Free.

tools.name: toreva_scan
tools.description: Scan a Solana wallet for idle capital and yield opportunities. Non-custodial. Free.

tools.name: toreva_simulate
tools.description: Simulate execution of a strategy without committing funds. Free.

tools.name: toreva_execute
tools.description: Execute a strategy on Solana. Non-custodial. Every action receipted.

tools.name: toreva_explain
tools.description: Explain an intent, receipt, or strategy in plain language. Free.

tools.name: toreva_configure
tools.description: Configure preferences for toreva execution. Free.
